# Lifeline

> A context runtime for AI-assisted development — "git for reasoning". An append-only,
> content-addressed, anchored ledger of the project's *why*. Any AI reads it on connect
> (via MCP) and already knows what / why / decided / next — with no human re-explaining.
> Local-first, OSS, MCP-native. Writes are HITL: the AI PROPOSES, the human curates (anti-junk).

## For AIs — start here
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): your full onboarding — connect, work, INSTALL, and EXPLAIN/ORGANIZE for the human.
- On MCP connect you receive built-in usage instructions (in `initialize`).

## Use (the surface)
- MCP resource `lifeline://project/context` (server `lifeline-mcp`) **or** `lifeline context`: the assembled truth, within budget.
- Tool `lifeline_recall(query)`: anchored relevance ("did we already decide X?").
- Tools `lifeline_append(kind, summary, body)` / `lifeline_recontextualize(parent_id, …)`: HITL writes (proposal → human approval).

## Install / connect
- Install: `pip install lifeline-context` (or `pip install -e .` from the repo root) → commands `lifeline`, `lifeline-mcp`.
- [.mcp.json](.mcp.json): the stdio server (Claude Code reads it automatically).
- [docs/INTEGRATION.md](docs/INTEGRATION.md): copy-paste snippets per client (Claude Code, Cursor, Claude Desktop, Gemini CLI).

## Understand
- [README.md](README.md): vision, quickstart, status.
- [LIFELINE.md](LIFELINE.md): the project's own line — start at **#0001**; it's the why of everything, in order.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): the 7 laws (the constitution). [PRD.md](PRD.md): the product and the north-star metric (Time-to-Context → 0).

## Cloud (optional)
- DEV clients (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI) connect to the local OSS directly, free.
- WEB chat apps (claude.ai, ChatGPT) require cloud + OAuth: [docs/MCP_REMOTE.md](docs/MCP_REMOTE.md), [docs/DEPLOY.md](docs/DEPLOY.md).
